category_sources: source_facts.description says virtctl uses advanced KubeVirt features; official KubeVirt user guide documents virtctl as the CLI for advanced virtual machine operations.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.executables both identify virtctl; official KubeVirt user guide uses virtctl.
docs_sources: Official KubeVirt user guide has a dedicated virtctl client tool documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and homepage identify KubeVirt; official user guide says virtctl supports console access, VM lifecycle operations, live migration, and disk uploads.
